_comment: Preview for the gated Task 2D.5f Npts=129 full sweep (Session 17 Phase G). Tiny 2x2x2x2x2x1 = 32-point grid at Npts=129 to validate schema and parquet output before dispatching the full 10080-point grid on HF Jobs. Local preview takes ~7-15 minutes (32 points * ~14 sec/pt single-threaded; parallelized across 4 workers ~2-4 min on the dev box per the run_sweep dispatcher's Windows worker cap).
